name: Frosted Toffee Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine oats, brown sugar, and margarine; mix well. Spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 13 minutes or until light golden brown, then cool on a wire rack.
5. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate pieces. Spread the melted chocolate over the baked oat mixture. Sprinkle with peanuts.
6. Chill for 4 hours or until the chocolate is set. Cut into 2x1 1/2-inch bars.
7. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator. Makes about 28 bars.
